package.name: ouster_obstacle_avoidance
package.description: Lightweight LiDAR-based local obstacle avoidance watchdog for forest navigation. Uses Ouster OS1-128 point cloud geometric (x, y, z) and "ambient" fields to detect obstacles within a set distance, computes a repulsive potential field, and publishes twist velocity commands at higher priority than the path-following controller but lower than the joystick.
